name: Birdie Boyz Indoor Golf
about: Birdie Boyz Indoor Golf is a family-owned indoor golf facility featuring 6 simulators, split between 3 Trugolf and 3 Aboutgolf technology, allowing for year-round play. It operates as a small business with a full bar offering an assortment of beers, seltzers, and spirits, complemented by a small kitchen menu. The venue caters to a variety of golfers, offering leagues, events, and a casual atmosphere where players can enjoy the game in a social setting with food and drinks.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of premium simulator technology (Trugolf & Aboutgolf)
Full-service bar and food menu available on-site
Year-round indoor play regardless of weather
Hosts leagues and events for social play
Family-owned and operated business with a welcoming atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Small kitchen menu available to satisfy cravings
Full bar with an assortment of beers, seltzers, and spirits

faq.answer: The information does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and a small kitchen menu available for your food and drink needs.

faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly and suitable for families.
